name: Lion
description: The lion is a large predatory cat known for living in social groups called prides.

name: Blue Whale
description: The blue whale is the largest animal ever known to have lived on Earth.

name: Great White Shark
description: The great white shark is one of the ocean's top predators.

name: Elephant
description: Elephants are the largest land animals and are known for their intelligence and strong social bonds.
